title: Add a user greeting component to the homepage
description:
As a logged-in user, I want to see a personalized greeting on the homepage so that I know I'm signed in.

The greeting should display my first name and the current time of day (Good morning/afternoon/evening).
acceptance_criteria: Greeting changes based on time of day: morning (5-12), afternoon (12-17), evening (17-5)
Component does not render for unauthenticated users
generated_acceptance_criteria: Greeting handles missing first name gracefully (display 'Hello!' instead)
Component is accessible (proper heading level, aria attributes)

test_scenarios.name: displays_morning_greeting
test_scenarios.description: When current hour is 8, greeting shows 'Good morning, {name}'

test_scenarios.name: hides_for_unauthenticated
test_scenarios.description: Component returns null when no user is authenticated

test_scenarios.name: greeting_visible_on_homepage
test_scenarios.description: Log in and verify greeting appears on homepage with correct name

edge_cases: User has no first name set in their profile
Timezone handling — should use the user's local time, not server time
analyst_notes: This is a simple presentation component. Check if the project has an existing auth context or user hook to get the current user's name.
